steel.structural.E.source: elastic modulus, typical structural steel (standard engineering reference value)

steel.structural.density.source: density, typical structural steel (standard engineering reference value)

steel.structural.poisson.source: Poisson's ratio, typical structural steel (standard engineering reference value)

aluminum.6061_t6.E.source: elastic modulus, aluminum 6061-T6 (standard engineering reference value)

water.liquid.c_p.source: specific heat capacity, liquid water near 20 °C (standard engineering reference value)
